nodes.name: hwIPSecTEKSAStatusTable
nodes.description: This table specifies the status attributes for Huawei IPSec Gdoi TEK SA.

nodes.name: hwIPSecTunnelStatsTable
nodes.description: This table specifies the status attributes for Huawei IPSec tunnel.

children.name: hwIPSecTunnelStatusChangeReason
children.description: IPSec tunnel status change reason.

children.name: hwIPSecTrapAuthenticationID
children.description: IPSec tunnel authentication ID.

children.name: hwIPSecTunnelVpnName
children.description: Ipsec tunnel vpn name.

children.name: hwIPSecTrapTunnelOfflineReason
children.description: Offline reason of the IPSec tunnel.

children.name: hwIPSecTrapTunnelDstIPMask
children.description: Destination IP address of the tunnel mask.

children.name: hwIPSecTrapTunnelPolicyNum
children.description: The sequence number of IPSec tunnel policy.

children.name: hwIPSecTrapIfIndex
children.description: Index of the router interface corresponding to the IPSec tunnel.

children.name: hwIPSecReasonCode
children.description: Fail reason code of negotiation.

children.name: hwIPSecTrapTunnelPolicyName
children.description: Security policy for the IPSec tunnel.

children.name: hwIPSecTrapAuthenticationIDType
children.description: IPSec tunnel authentication ID type.

children.name: hwIPSecTrapRouteNextHope
children.description: Ipsec opr route next hope.

children.name: hwIPSecTrapTunnelRemotePort
children.description: Port number of the peer end of the tunnel.

nodes.name: hwIPSecSaStatisticTable
nodes.description: This table specifies the SA numbers of policies which have been bound with interfaces.

nodes.name: hwIPSecGdoiStatsTable
nodes.description: This table specifies the status attributes for Huawei IPSec Gdoi.

children.name: hwIPSecGdoiStatsEntry
children.description: Each entry in the hwIPSecGdoiStatsTable holds a set of monitoring status parameters associated with an instance of IPSec gdoi.

children.name: hwIPSecTunnelSendErrorSize
children.description: Statistic the total Error bytes of the sent packets.

children.name: hwIPSecTunnelSendSize
children.description: Statistic the total bytes of the sent packet.

children.name: hwIPSecTunnelSendErrorPacket
children.description: Statistic the error number of the sent packets.

children.name: hwIPSecTunnelRecvErrorSize
children.description: Statistic the total error bytes of the recieved packets.

nodes.name: hwIPSecTunnelConfigTable
nodes.description: This table specifies the configuration attributes for Huawei IPSec tunnel.

children.name: hwIPSecTunnelConfigEntry
children.description: Each entry in the hwIPSecTunnelConfigTable holds a set of monitoring configuration parameters associated with an instance of IPSec tunnel.

children.name: hwIPSecTunnelLifeTime
children.description: Life cycle of the IPSec tunnel (in seconds).

children.name: hwIPSecTunnelSrcIP
children.description: Source IP address of the tunnel (local end).

children.name: hwIPSecTunnelInitiator
children.description: Initiator or responder of the IPSec tunnel.

children.name: hwIPSecTunnelFromIKEV2
children.description: Whether the tunnel adopts IKEv2 (If yes, the value is 1.).

children.name: hwIPSecTunnelPolicyAlias
children.description: Security policy alias for the IPSec tunnel.

children.name: hwIPSecTunnelInsideIPv6
children.description: Intranet IPv6 address of the peer end during remote access.

children.name: hwIPSecTunnelOutPortIndex
children.description: Index of the egress of the tunnel.

children.name: hwIPSecTunnelSrcPort
children.description: Indicates the source port number if NAT traversal is adopted.

children.name: hwIPSecTunnelLifeSize
children.description: Life cycle of the IPSec tunnel (in kbytes).

children.name: hwIPSecGlobalPacketInput
children.description: Number of received security packets.

children.name: hwIPSecGlobalReplay
children.description: Number of discarded packets caused by the packet replay.

children.name: hwIPSecGlobalPacketOutput
children.description: Number of sent security packets.

children.name: hwIPSecGlobalByteInput
children.description: Number of bytes of received security packets.

children.name: hwIPSecGlobalIKEInboundOK
children.description: Number of received IKE negotiation packets that successfully enter the queue.

children.name: hwIPSecGlobalConnectionRate
children.description: New Connection Rate of IPSec tunnels.

children.name: hwIPSecGlobalSoftExpr
children.description: Soft timeout times.

children.name: hwIPSecGlobalSoftwareSucc
children.description: Software computing success.

children.name: hwIPSecGlobalBytesPerSecondOut
children.description: Outgoing encrypted IPsec packet rate, in bytes/s.

children.name: hwIPSecGlobalEncPacketFirstSlice
children.description: Number of initial packets to be encrypted.

children.name: hwIPSecGlobalModpCnt
children.description: Modular exponentiation calculation.

children.name: hwIPSecGlobalEncIntactPacket
children.description: Number of packets that do not need to be fragmented.

children.name: hwIPSecGlobalIKEInboundErr
children.description: Number of received IKE negotiation packets that fail to enter the queue.

children.name: hwIPSecGlobalIKEOutboundOK
children.description: Number of sent IKE negotiation packets that successfully enter the queue.

children.name: hwIPSecGlobalTotalPhase1Num
children.description: Total Number of IPSec Phase1 tunnels.

children.name: hwIPSecGlobalDroppedPacketOutput
children.description: Number of discarded packets that are sent.

children.name: hwIPSecGlobalBadAuthentication
children.description: Number of discarded packets caused by the authentication failure.

children.name: hwIPSecGlobalBytesPerSecondIn
children.description: Incoming encrypted IPsec packet rate, in bytes/s.

children.name: hwIPSecGlobalTotal
children.description: Total number of IPSec Phase2 tunnels.

children.name: hwIPSecGlobalMemoryApplyFail
children.description: Number of discarded packets caused by memory applying failure.

children.name: hwIPSecGlobalSaeSucc
children.description: SAE computing success.

children.name: hwIPSecGlobalPacketHeaderWrong
children.description: Number of discarded packets caused by the packet header error.

children.name: hwIPSecGlobalExceedPacketLimit
children.description: Number of discarded packets caused by the exceeding of the packet limit.

children.name: hwIPSecGlobalDecPacketReassFirstSlice
children.description: Number of initial packets that are fragmented and assembled.

children.name: hwIPSecGlobalDPDOper
children.description: DPD operation and detection times.

children.name: hwIPSecGlobalDecPacketReassAfterSlice
children.description: Number of follow-up packets that are fragmented and assembled.

children.name: hwIPSecGlobalDecPacketReassLenErr
children.description: Number of packets with incorrect length during reassembling.

children.name: hwIPSecGlobalHardExpr
children.description: Hard timeout times.

children.name: hwIPSecGlobalWrongSA
children.description: Number of discarded packets caused by incorrect security associations.

children.name: hwIPSecGlobalPreRecheckErr
children.description: Number of discarded packets caused by the pre-check failure.

children.name: hwIPSecGlobalDroppedPacketInput
children.description: Number of discarded packets that are received.

children.name: hwIPSecGlobalByteOutput
children.description: Number of bytes of sent security packets.

children.name: hwIPSecGlobalCannotFindSA
children.description: Number of discarded packets caused by no matched security associations.

children.name: hwIPSecGlobalEncPacketAfterSlice
children.description: Number of follow-up packets to be encrypted.

children.name: hwIPSecGlobalExceedByteLimit
children.description: Number of discarded packets caused by the exceeding of the byte limit.

children.name: hwIPSecGlobalProcessIpv4Err
children.description: Number of discarded packets caused by the plain-text forwarding failure.

children.name: hwIPSecGlobalIKEOutboundErr
children.description: Number of sent IKE negotiation packets that fail to enter the queue.

children.name: hwIPSecGlobalPostRecheckErr
children.description: Number of discarded packets caused by the post-check failure

children.name: hwIPSecGlobalFibSearchErr
children.description: Number of discarded packets caused by the route check failure.
